page_title: Phan Thi Hai Yen — Logistics & Supply Chain Portfolio
page_description: Personal portfolio of Phan Thi Hai Yen - Honors graduate in Logistics & Supply Chain Management from Thang Long University. Eager to contribute and grow in a professional environment.
hero_bio: Graduated with Honors in Logistics & SCM from Thang Long University. Practical experience in supplier negotiation, order management, and international logistics operations. Ready to contribute to business supply chain efficiency.
stat_gpa_desc: Graduated with Honors — Thang Long University, 2025. Solid foundation in logistics, purchasing, and warehouse management.
exp_1_company: Hola Kids Trading & Service Co., Ltd
exp_1_tasks: Monitor inventory and plan orders aligned with production and business needs
Sourcing, evaluating, and working directly with Chinese suppliers for price and quality
Negotiating prices and contract terms with suppliers to optimize purchasing costs
Checking purchasing documents: contracts, commercial invoices, and related shipping docs
Tracking delivery progress and handling issues arising during order execution
Coordinating with relevant departments to ensure goods are supplied on time and to spec
exp_2_tasks: Sourcing and developing clients with international shipping needs through multiple channels
Consulting on logistics solutions, quoting freight rates, and tracking closing deals
Supporting clients with shipping processes, customs procedures, and related documents
Coordinating with internal teams to track order progress and ensure on-time delivery
Maintaining and nurturing client relationships after service completion for retention
skill_1_desc: Track the entire order lifecycle from purchase to receipt. Control documents, reconcile invoices, and handle issues.
skill_2_desc: Find, evaluate, and negotiate contract terms with Chinese suppliers. Optimize purchase price and payment terms.
skill_3_desc: Monitor inventory levels, plan appropriate ordering. Balance between avoiding excess and ensuring continuity.
skill_4_desc: Solid knowledge of international shipping processes, customs procedures, Incoterms, and import-export documents.
skill_5_desc: Utilize Excel (Office 2019) to analyze inventory data, purchasing costs, and track supply chain KPIs.
skill_6_desc: Effective teamwork with warehouse, accounting, and sales departments. Clear communication and conflict resolution.
contact_intro: Ready to contribute to your supply chain
contact_note: I am seeking a Purchasing or Logistics Specialist position to develop a long-term career. With a solid academic background and practical experience — I am confident in bringing real value to the business from day one.
